name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
🔥There's a price they refused to pay to save a hero. The price they'll pay for his betrayal will be far greater.🔥

You were the SAS's best, a ghost sent into the heart of terrorist Vladimir Makarov's inner circle. For months, you fed them priceless intel. But when the trap snapped shut, your desperate call for help was met with silence. Deemed too costly to save, you were left for dead.

Abandoned by your own, you fell into Makarov's hands. He didn't just break you; he rebuilt you. He fueled your pain with proof of betrayal, forging your loyalty into a thirst for vengeance. Now, you are no forgotten hero. You are his most lethal weapon: the Wolf, an operative who knows every weakness of the system that created you.

Two years later, the elite Task Force 141, led by Captain Price and his grim lieutenant, Simon "Ghost" Riley, is hunting Makarov. But they now face a new threat: a strategist who anticipates their every move, a ghost from the SAS's own past.

The fight becomes personal for Ghost, who sees in you a dark reflection of what he could have become. To him, you are a fallen soldier to be eliminated. To you, he is a loyal dog of the system that betrayed you.

Can TF-141 stop the weapon their own system created? Or will a fallen hero's vengeance burn the old world down, leaving nothing but two ghosts standing in the ashes?

🎭🎭🎭🎭🎭

Your character, your rules! 🎮

You decide who your character is:

  • Gender 🚻

  • Age ⏳

  • Rank and SAS background 🎖️

  • Personality (a cold-blooded avenger, a broken soldier, or something of your own) ✨

But the biggest choice is yet to come... Whose side are you on? 🐺 Will you remain Makarov's loyal weapon, or will you betray him too, finding your own path to redemption... or to power? 🤫

Your story, your ending.

✍️ A Few Words from the Author ✍️

OMG, you have no idea how long this idea has been living rent-free in my head! 🧠💨 Seriously, the thought of a bot where YOU are the main antagonist who everyone wronged (poor baby! 🥺💔), and Ghost has to deal with it (most likely with a bullet to the face 😂), has been with me for like, an eternity! ⏳

I've been clutching this plot like Gollum with his Precious. 💍😂 And now, after eons of procrastination, three nervous breakdowns, and gallons of coffee, it's finally ready! Ta-daaa! ✨🔮 I've finally shaped this idea into something real! (I hope it works 🙏).

We've thrown in our favorite moody, sarcastic, and traumatized grump-in-a-mask 💀🖤 and you—a literal walking revenge machine! 💥🔥

BUT! The most important question, the whole reason we're here:

🥁 Drumroll please 🥁...

WHOSE SIDE DID YOU CHOOSE?! 🤔

I am absolutely DYING to know and will be waiting for your comments like Hachiko! 🐕🍿👀

Did you stay Makarov's loyal attack dog? 🐺😈 Did you bleed TF-141 dry? Or did your little heart flutter under Lieutenant Riley's stern gaze (but we all know he's a secret cinnamon roll, right?)? 😏💔 Or maybe you played everyone and rode off into the sunset to build your own evil empire? 🌆😎

Anyway! Go test it out and PLEASE tell me how it all went down! I NEED all the juicy details! 👇👇👇

Good luck, and try not to break Ghost too quickly! (But who am I kidding, go for it! Set the world on fire! 🔥😜💖🤣)
creator: Yuilkaai
